mapper.select:
select t.* from device_command_record t
t.is_deleted = 0
and t.create_user_name like concat('%', #{operateUserName}, '%')
and t.command_type = #{commandType}
and t.success = 1
and t.success = 0
and t.space_name like concat('%', #{spaceName}, '%')
and t.device_name like concat('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
and t.device_no like concat('%', #{deviceNo}, '%')
and t.device_type_key = #{deviceType}
and t.execute_times <= #{executeTimes}
order by id asc
order by id desc
limit #{limit}

select t.* from device_command_record t where t.is_deleted = 0 and t.ensure_success = 1 and t.success = 0 and t.is_running = 0 and t.execute_times > 0 and t.execute_times < #{maxExecuteTimes} order by t.id asc limit #{fetchSize}
mapper.update: update device_command_record set is_running = 1, last_execute_time = #{startTime}, execute_times = execute_times + 1 where id = #{commandId} and is_deleted = 0 and success = 0 and is_running = 0 and execute_times < #{maxExecuteTimes}
update device_command_record set is_running = 0 where is_deleted = 0 and is_running = 1 and last_execute_time < #{timeoutTime}

update device_command_record set success = #{success},
success_time = #{successTime},
last_execute_time = #{lastExecuteTime}, is_running = #{isRunning} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
